name: Zenefits (TriNet Zenefits) HR Platform API
what_it_does: Zenefits (now TriNet Zenefits) REST API for SMB HR, benefits administration, and payroll. Enables AI agents to manage employee onboarding and HR records for SMB workforce management, handle benefits enrollment and carrier integration for SMB benefits administration, access payroll processing and tax filing for SMB payroll automation, retrieve time and attendance tracking for workforce compliance, manage ACA compliance tracking and 1095-C generation for healthcare coverage reporting, handle document management and e-signature for HR document workflow, access PTO and leave management for employee self-service, retrieve performance management and review workflow for talent management, manage compliance training and certification tracking, and integrate Zenefits HR data with payroll, benefits carriers, and HRIS platforms.
use_cases: Automating SMB employee onboarding from HR agents
Managing benefits enrollment from benefits administration agents
Processing SMB payroll from payroll agents
Tracking ACA compliance from HR compliance agents
not_for: Large enterprises requiring advanced HRIS capabilities
Organizations needing complex union or CBA workforce rules
best_when: A small to mid-size US employer using Zenefits wants AI agents to automate HR onboarding, benefits enrollment, payroll, ACA compliance, and employee lifecycle management.
avoid_when: PLATFORM STABILITY RISK: Zenefits faced major regulatory and compliance issues (2016 California DOI fine, executive leadership changes) and was acquired by TriNet; platform and API may have changed significantly. ACA 1095-C automated generation requires accurate full-time equivalent determination; automated FTE errors create IRS Employer Shared Responsibility penalties. Zenefits payroll integration with third-party carriers requires careful data synchronization; carrier EDI timing errors create coverage gaps.

auth.notes: Zenefits uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal previously at developer.zenefits.com. Webhooks for HR events. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. TriNet acquired Zenefits (2022). TriNet is public (TNET NYSE). Zenefits founded 2013 by Parker Conrad. SMB HR platform. Had major 2016 regulatory issues (unlicensed insurance brokerage). Now TriNet Zenefits. Competes with Gusto, Rippling, and BambooHR for SMB HR platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-employee monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee monthly subscription tiers (Essentials, Growth, Zen)
pricing.notes: San Francisco, CA. TriNet (TNET NYSE) acquired Zenefits 2022. Zenefits founded 2013. SMB HR platform. Major regulatory issues 2016. Now TriNet Zenefits. Competes with Gusto and Rippling for SMB HR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: PLATFORM STABILITY RISK: Zenefits 2016 regulatory crisis and TriNet acquisition created significant platform changes; API documentation and stability may reflect this turbulent history
ACA FTE calculation — automated ACA full-time equivalent determination requires accurate hours tracking; FTE errors create IRS Employer Shared Responsibility penalties up to $2,880/employee
Carrier EDI synchronization — benefits carrier EDI 834 transmission timing requires enrollment window compliance; late carrier files create coverage gaps and retroactive premium disputes
TriNet integration complexity — post-acquisition Zenefits integration with TriNet PEO services creates data model complexity for employer vs PEO benefit sponsorship
HIPAA benefits data — benefits enrollment contains employee health information and PHI; BAA required for all API integrations accessing benefits data
Developer portal status — Zenefits developer portal may have changed post-acquisition; verify current API documentation and OAuth endpoint status with TriNet Zenefits
agent_readiness.security_notes: SMB HR and benefits. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee HR, benefits, and payroll data.

security_score_components.security_notes: SMB HR platform. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee HR and benefits data.
